core_principles: Calm minimalism: Heavy whitespace, progressive disclosure, low cognitive load.
Low-stimulus visual design: Muted color palettes, no sharp contrasts or alarming reds.
Empathy-first recovery: Focus on 'growth maps' and trend lines rather than just unbroken streaks to avoid shame upon relapse.
Tactile grounding: Use soft neumorphism and subtle borders to make components feel tangible, anchoring the user during an urge.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous spacing. Use p-6, p-8, p-12 for containers. Gap-6 to gap-8 in bento grids.
layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: The 'Bento' Grid Protocol. Mode B: Density but with vast internal padding. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3. The main 'Urge' CTA should span full width on mobile, col-span-2 on desktop.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-aligned content for readability, centered for breathing exercises and major CTAs to create focus.

cards.style: Soft Tactile UI: Flat white background, 1px subtle border (border-[#E8E6E1]), soft diffuse shadow (shadow-sm). rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl for approachability.

buttons.primary: Solid #6B9080 background, text-white, rounded-full for friendly feel. hover:bg-[#5A7A6C] transition-colors duration-300.
buttons.urge_cta: Massive button. Solid #E5989B (Muted Rose) background, text-white. pulse animation when active.

inputs.style: Shadcn defaults customized. rounded-xl, border-[#E8E6E1], focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#A4C3B2] focus:border-transparent bg-white.

data_visualization.style: Use smooth line charts (Recharts) with area gradients using primary colors (#6B9080) for progress. Avoid red/green 'pass/fail' binary charts.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Soft lift (-translate-y-1) and slight shadow increase (shadow-md).
motion_and_interactions.breathing_timer: Use Framer Motion for a slow, expansive, rhythmic scale animation on a circle. 4s inhale (scale 1 to 1.5), 4s hold, 6s exhale (scale 1.5 to 1).
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Fade in with a slight upward drift (y: 10 to 0) to feel uplifting.

breathing_visual.description: A minimal, peaceful, abstract breathing circle visualization

calming_abstract.description: Abstract soft 3d shapes in sage green and warm sand colors

peaceful_water.description: A body of water with a boat in the distance

moss_texture.description: Moss-covered tree trunk in a lush forest

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5, rounded edges. Size 20px for standard, 24px for key actions.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use 'Outfit' and 'Figtree' from Google Fonts.
Use standard Tailwind classes mapped to the custom color palette.
Implement the Urge Timer as the most prominent feature on the dashboard, using Framer Motion for the breathing circle.
Ensure the Relapse Recovery System uses encouraging copy ('You slipped. Let's reset.') instead of negative, failure-oriented language.
All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='urge-button').
Use Recharts for progress tracking, opting for smooth area charts with #A4C3B2 gradients.
Avoid the default Shadcn look by rounding borders to `rounded-2xl` and padding generously.
